post.description: Trigger a reindex of cached entities. Operational note: key_contact is high-volume (~300k records in prod); reindex only the active window by passing a `since` ~2 years back (e.g. since=2024-06-01T00:00:00Z) rather than a full key_contact reindex.

parameters.description: If-Match header value for conditional requests

schema.description: If-Match header value for conditional requests

409.description: Conflict: Concurrent modification — retry with fresh settings

post.description: Add (invite) a single principal to a B2B organization's writers or auditors. Per-principal merge: existing members are preserved; the new entry lands as a pending invite (no username yet).

409.description: Conflict: Principal already present, or concurrent modification — retry with fresh settings

delete.description: Remove a single principal's access (revoke an accepted grant or cancel a pending invite) from a B2B organization. Per-principal merge: all other members are untouched.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email of the principal to remove

parameters.description: If-Match header value for conditional requests

schema.description: If-Match header value for conditional requests

404.description: NotFound: Organization or principal not found

409.description: Conflict: Concurrent modification, or last-Admin invariant — retry with fresh settings

get.description: Get a specific project membership by UID

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: If-None-Match header value for conditional requests

schema.description: If-None-Match header value for conditional requests

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: If-Modified-Since header value for conditional requests (HTTP date format)

schema.description: If-Modified-Since header value for conditional requests (HTTP date format)

type.description: Entity type: b2b_org, project_membership, key_contact, or b2b_org_settings

AdminReindexItem.description: A single entity to reindex (targeted mode)

dry_run.description: When true, walk SOQL/live-path but skip publishing. Final log includes would_publish_count.

items.description: Targeted list of entities to reindex (surgical mode). Mutually exclusive with types and since. Max 100 items.

since.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 timestamp with explicit zone; only records with LastModifiedDate >= since are reindexed. Mutually exclusive with items. Handler normalises to UTC. For key_contact (high-volume), prefer a ~2-year window (e.g. 2024-06-01T00:00:00Z) to sync only the active set instead of the full ~300k records.

types.description: Entity types to reindex (optional; default = all in-scope: b2b_org, project_membership, key_contact, b2b_org_settings). Mutually exclusive with items.

AdminReindexPayload.description: Request payload for triggering a reindex operation

run_id.description: Correlation ID for the reindex run (for log lookups)

sfid.description: Salesforce Account.Id (15- or 18-character); used to fetch and cache the org record

B2bOrgCreateBody.description: Request body for registering a B2B organization by its Salesforce Account ID

domain_aliases.description: Additional domains; each item is a bare host with the same normalization as primary_domain

is_member.description: Whether the organization is currently an LF member (Account.IsMember__c); read-only, managed by Salesforce workflows

parent_uid.description: UID of the parent organization (Account.ParentId); omitted when no parent

primary_domain.description: Primary domain; bare host only, no scheme or path, e.g. 'example.com'

slug.description: URL-friendly organization identifier; populated when Account.Slug__c is available

status.description: LF membership status (Account.LF_Membership_Status__c); read-only, managed by Salesforce workflows

website.description: Organization website URL; always has a scheme (http or https)

auditors.description: Read-only principals (auditor relation in FGA). Full-replace on PUT.

writers.description: Org administrators (writer relation in FGA). Full-replace on PUT.

B2bOrgSettingsResponse.description: Access-control settings for a b2b_org: writers and auditors

auditors.description: Complete replacement list for org auditors. Nil = leave unchanged; [] = remove all.

writers.description: Complete replacement list for org writers. Nil = leave unchanged; [] = remove all.

B2bOrgSettingsUpdateBody.description: Request body for replacing the writers and/or auditors list on a b2b_org. Full-replace: nil = keep existing; [] = remove all.

crunch_base_url.description: CrunchBase profile URL (Account.CrunchBase_URL__c); pass empty string to explicitly clear

B2bOrgUpdateBody.description: Request body for updating mutable fields on a B2B organization

fault.description: Is the error a server-side fault?

id.description: ID is a unique identifier for this particular occurrence of the problem.

message.description: Message is a human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

name.description: Name is the name of this class of errors.

board_member.description: Whether this contact holds a board member role

email.description: Contact email address; used to resolve or create the Salesforce Contact record

first_name.description: Contact first name; used when creating a new Contact on miss

last_name.description: Contact last name; used when creating a new Contact on miss

primary_contact.description: Whether this is the primary contact for the membership

title.description: Contact job title. Only persisted when a new Salesforce Contact is created (email resolves to an unknown address); ignored if the Contact already exists.

KeyContactCreateBody.description: Request body for creating a key contact (Project_Role__c record)

board_member.description: Whether this contact holds a board member role

email.description: Contact email address; normalized to lowercase before update

primary_contact.description: Whether this is the primary contact for the membership

title.description: Contact job title. Only persisted when the email change resolves to an unknown address and a new Salesforce Contact is created; ignored if the Contact already exists.

KeyContactUpdateBody.description: Request body for updating a key contact (Project_Role__c record)

next_page_token.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. Pass this value as the page_token query parameter to retrieve the next page. Empty or absent when this is the last page.

total_size.description: Total number of records matching the query. Set on the first page; may be 0 on continuation pages.

uid.description: Tier UID (invertible UUID v8 from Product2.Id)

MembershipTierResponse.description: A membership tier (Product2) scoped to a project

email.description: User email address; required to identify the principal

invite_status.description: Invite lifecycle state; returned on GET, derived by service on PUT

invited_as.description: Relation being granted: writer or auditor

username.description: LFID username (OIDC sub); absent for pending invites

OrgUser.description: A writer or auditor principal on a b2b_org settings list

email.description: Invitee email; identity key for the grant

invited_as.description: Relation to grant: writer (Admin) or auditor (Viewer)

name.description: Optional display name; the service derives it from the user record when omitted

OrgUserAddBody.description: Request body to add (invite) a single principal to a b2b_org's writers or auditors

OrgUserRoleBody.description: Request body to change a single principal's role on a b2b_org

b2b_org_uid.description: UID of the B2B organization (Account) this key contact's membership belongs to

board_member.description: Whether this contact holds a board member role

company_logo_url.description: Member company logo URL (denormalized from Asset.Account)

email.description: Primary email address from Alternate_Email__c where Primary_Email__c = true

primary_contact.description: Whether this is the primary contact for the membership

tier_uid.description: UID of the associated membership tier (Product2)

uid.description: Key contact UID (invertible UUID v8 from Project_Role__c.Id)

ProjectKeyContactResponse.description: A key contact (Project_Role__c) scoped to a membership, with denormalized contact and company attributes

agreement_date.description: Date the membership agreement was signed

annual_full_price.description: Full annual list price before discounts

b2b_org_uid.description: UID of the B2B organization (Account) this membership belongs to

company_logo_url.description: Member company logo URL (denormalized from Account)

project_slug.description: URL slug of the project this membership belongs to

tier_uid.description: UID of the associated membership tier (Product2)

uid.description: Membership UID (invertible UUID v8 from Asset.Id)

ProjectMembershipResponse.description: A membership (Asset) scoped to a project, with denormalized company attributes

crunch_base_url.description: CrunchBase profile URL (Account.CrunchBase_URL__c); pass empty string to explicitly clear

auditors.description: Complete replacement list for org auditors. Nil = leave unchanged; [] = remove all.

writers.description: Complete replacement list for org writers. Nil = leave unchanged; [] = remove all.

board_member.description: Whether this contact holds a board member role

email.description: Contact email address; normalized to lowercase before update

primary_contact.description: Whether this is the primary contact for the membership

title.description: Contact job title. Only persisted when the email change resolves to an unknown address and a new Salesforce Contact is created; ignored if the Contact already exists.

tags.name: membership-service
tags.description: Membership management service — direct resource endpoints for B2B orgs, memberships, and key contacts
